name: GDP per Capita Analysis
description: Research top 5 economies by GDP, find their populations, calculate GDP per capita, rank them, and save results to file

tasks.name: Research GDP and Population Data
tasks.description: You MUST call WebSearch to find the GDP and population of the top 5 economies in the world (2026 or latest available data). Search for 'top 5 economies by GDP 2026' and 'population of [country]' for each. Output the FULL raw search results verbatim including all URLs, titles, and snippets with the actual GDP values and population numbers. Do NOT summarize as 'data was found' — downstream tasks need the actual numerical data. Output format: For each of the 5 countries, include: country name, GDP value with units (USD billions/trillions), population value with units, and source URL.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains 5 country names with corresponding GDP values (in USD), population values (numerical), and at least one source URL from WebSearch results

tasks.name: Calculate GDP per Capita
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to calculate GDP per capita for each country. Extract the GDP and population data from task_001's output. Do NOT invent numbers — only use data explicitly present in task_001. Write Python code that: (1) parses the 5 countries with their GDP and population from task_001, (2) calculates GDP per capita = GDP / population for each, (3) sorts by GDP per capita highest to lowest, (4) outputs a formatted list. If any data is missing from task_001, output 'data not found for [country]'. Output format: Python code that prints ranked list like '1. [Country]: GDP per capita $X'.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains Python execution results showing 5 countries ranked by GDP per capita with numerical values, sorted highest to lowest

tasks.name: Save Results to File
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to save the ranked GDP per capita analysis from task_002 to a file named 'gdp_analysis.txt'. The file content should include the ranked list of countries with their GDP per capita values. Use the exact output from task_002's Python execution.
tasks.success_criteria: file_write tool successfully called with filename 'gdp_analysis.txt' containing the ranked GDP per capita data
